betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Nightmares are fire-proof horses created by feeding an essence of fire to a zorse. They can't use horse armor, but you can activate a fire trail by using a whip on the ground next to them. This trail is actual fire so be careful but it does go out after some time.

According to the wiki you can breed these light normal horses but it doesn't say what with ¯\_(ツ)_/¯.
